title: Create Optimized+[Forge]
description: A Modpack Combining Create with Many Suitable Mods and Optimization Mods...
body:
A Minecraft Modpack Combining Create with Many Suitable Mods and Optimization Mods.
### **Features**
- You Can Build Your Own Factory with Machines You Can Automate and Travel on Trains.
- Vanilla Preserves Minecraft's Features but Adds Many New Features.
- If You're Tired of Falling Down While Doing Big Builds You Can Use Jetpacks!
- You Can Use Many New Building Blocks Inside Builds.
- You Can Build Your Own Market with Sales Mechanics.
### **About Modpack**
This Modpack is optimized for those who love Create but have low FPS with Shader or because their computer is not enough.

If you download this modpack, you can double your enjoyment of Minecraft and you will want to play Minecraft.

#### **You can write your requests or comments on my Discord server.**
